participants.name: John Michael Gyllenborg
participants.notes: NFL Combine attendee. Combine measurables: 6-5 3/4, 249 lbs, 10" hands, 31" arms; 4.60 40, 35.5" vert, 128" broad, 4.22 shuttle. At pro day did bench press and ran routes per Powell Tribune; sat on combine testing numbers. Scouts reported he looked exceptional catching the football. Exact pro day bench reps not publicly reported.

participants.name: Caden Barnett
participants.notes: Listed at 6-5, 320 in-season; weighed 316 at pro day per EssentiallySports. 40 time of 5.03 with 1.73 10-yard split. Broad jump 8-foot-9. East-West Shrine Bowl and Hula Bowl participant. All-Mountain West Second Team. Met with Saints on Tuesday before pro day. Hand-timed.

participants.name: Jack Walsh
participants.notes: Center. All-Mountain West selection. Hula Bowl participant. Specific pro day drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Sam Scott
participants.notes: Weighed approximately 215 lbs, down 12 lbs from 2025 playing weight of 227. 40-yard dash reported as unofficial 4.5 seconds. Vertical of 40 inches. Hand-timed. Head coach Sawvel said 'He had a very good day.'

participants.name: Evan Svoboda
participants.notes: Listed at 6-5, 251. Former quarterback converted to tight end. Hula Bowl participant. Has heard from Bengals, Saints; had lunch with Washington Commanders scouts after pro day. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Brayden Johnson
participants.notes: All-Mountain West selection. Led all Wyoming pro day participants with 26 reps on the 225-lb bench press. Other drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Evan Eller
participants.notes: All-Mountain West selection. Transfer. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Dainsus Miller
participants.notes: All-Mountain West selection. Transfer. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Ben Florentine
participants.notes: All-Mountain West selection. From Anaheim, Calif. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Jevon Davis
participants.notes: Safety. From Casper, Wyo. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Justin Erb
participants.notes: Tight end. From Wakefield, Neb. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Michael Fitzgerald
participants.notes: Wide receiver. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Chisom Ifeanyi
participants.notes: Defensive end. From Langhorne, Pa. Transfer (Shippensburg, then FAU, then Wyoming). Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Clay Nanke
participants.notes: Wide receiver. From Denver, Colo. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Jaylen Sargent
participants.notes: Wide receiver. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Aneesh Vyas
participants.notes: Defensive tackle. From West Chester, Ohio. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Tyce Westland
participants.notes: Defensive end. From Pleasanton, Neb. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Carson York
participants.notes: Long snapper. Specific drill numbers not publicly reported.

participants.name: Max White

additional_notes: Wyoming held its annual Pro Day on Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at the High Altitude Performance Center and Indoor Practice Facility in Laramie. 19 student-athletes participated with 20 NFL teams in attendance. Current Wyoming QBs Mason Drube and Gage Brook threw passes to receivers/tight ends during positional drills. The event was indoors. Head coach Jay Sawvel noted several players performed well. The official GoWyo post-event recap and local beat coverage (7220sports, Wyoming Tribune Eagle) explicitly noted that 'all final numbers weren't readily available,' meaning Wyoming did not publicly release a full results sheet. Only select numbers were reported by media: Caden Barnett's testing via EssentiallySports (5.03 40, 31" vert, 8'9" broad, 4.63 shuttle at 316 lbs), Sam Scott's 40" vertical and unofficial 4.5 40 via 7220sports, and Brayden Johnson's 26 bench press reps via Wyoming Tribune Eagle. A PDF was posted on GoWyo pre-event (participant list/schedule) but comprehensive post-event results were not published. Gyllenborg was the only NFL Combine invitee; he did bench press and ran routes at pro day but sat on his combine testing numbers. Gyllenborg combine measurements included here for reference: 6-5 3/4 (77.75"), 249 lbs, 10" hands, 31" arms. EssentiallySports reported 18 teams while official UW release said 20 teams. Andrew Johnson (S) and Isaac Sell (S) were on the pre-event participant list but were not listed in the post-event 19-participant count, suggesting they did not ultimately participate. Times reported appear to be hand-timed/unofficial.
